_comment: Full Hevy exercise-template index for draft_custom title resolution (ADR-069). Built from hevy_write_client.list_templates (built-in + account custom exercises). Keys are normalized titles (lowercased, whitespace-collapsed). draft_custom resolves any exercise by exact normalized title -> tmpl:<id>; a live Hevy lookup self-heals brand-new templates not yet in this index. NOT the generator's curated pool (that is movement_catalog.json).

banded alt cross body hammer curls.title: Banded Alt Cross Body Hammer Curls

behind the back bicep wrist curl (barbel.title: Behind the Back Bicep Wrist Curl (Barbell)

db reach across single leg rdl.title: DB Reach Across Single Leg RDL

db single leg rdl calf raises.title: DB Single leg RDL calf Raises

lying on back to 10 yard sprint.title: Lying On Back To 10 Yard Sprint

single leg static balance with eyes clos.title: Single Leg Static Balance With Eyes Closed
